creator: brnrd@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 173698
svn diff for www/nghttp2

I've combined the patches from bug #211774 and #211494
The options have been moved to the location where the existing ASIO and HPACK options were implemented

Proposed commit log:

> www/nghttp2: Update to 1.13.0
> 
>   - Update to 1.13.0
>   - Switch USE_OPENSSL to USES= ssl
>   - Add options for APPS and SPDY
>   - Default no change (i.e. APPS and SPDY on)
>   - Add rc-script for nghttpx
>  - Add sample config for nghttpx
> 
> PR:   211336, 211494, 211774
> Submitted by:  brnrd (211336, 1.13.0 only)
> Submitted by:  peter (211494, rc-script and sample config)
> Submitted by:  Robert Schulze <rs@bytecamp.net> (211774, APPS and SPDY options)

Tested with default and APPS+SPDY options disabled
https://brnrd.eu/poudriere/data/110libre-default/2016-08-15_12h31m33s/logs/nghttp2-1.13.0.log
